strategic_direction.title: Webinar Post-Game: Lead Recovery Sequence
strategic_direction.reasoning: With the April 9th webinar date set and registration live, we need an automated 'Didn't Attend' and 'Attended/Didn't Book' sequence to maximize the ROI of the session.

strategic_direction.title: Paid Retargeting for Diagnostic Page
strategic_direction.reasoning: Since Google Analytics is now installed and the 'Strength in Numbers' landing page is in progress, we should trigger small-budget retargeting ads to keep BEC CFO top-of-mind for site visitors.

suggested_agenda.notes: Confirm Zoom setup and GA installation are complete.
Discuss the 'Stale' cPanel request and the Messaging Framework—these are bottlenecking the website and creative builds.
Review status of Headlines, Banner Copy, and the Email/SMS sequences being built by Bill.
Pitch the Paid Ads service to support the new 'Strength in Numbers' landing page.
Confirm owners and dates for the next 7 days.

projected_roadmap.title: Webinar Retargeting Ad Campaign
projected_roadmap.what: Launch targeted Facebook/LinkedIn ads specifically reaching people who visited the webinar registration page but didn't sign up. Includes ad creative, copy, and technical pixel setup.
projected_roadmap.why_now: The Zoom registration is live and the webinar is set for April 9th. We need to capture the 'fence-sitters' to ensure a high attendance rate. This bridges the current 'paid-ads' service gap.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 5 hours: 2 for creative/copy, 2 for technical setup, 1 for optimization in week 1.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Budget approval ($500-$1,000 pilot) and creative assets approval.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Finalize Workshop Headlines and Banner Copy.
projected_roadmap.impact: Increases webinar registration rate by an estimated 15-20% by capturing lost traffic.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: Marcus, now that we have the April 9th date locked in and the registration page ready, I’d love to flip the switch on some simple retargeting ads. It's a low-cost way to make sure anyone who clicks but doesn't sign up gets a friendly nudge to come back. It’s the best way to protect our marketing spend and ensure that room is full.

projected_roadmap.title: Post-Webinar 'Scorecard' Nurture Automation
projected_roadmap.what: A 5-part automated email series sent to webinar attendees who don't immediately book a diagnostic. The content will focus on the 'Strength in Numbers' concept, providing more value before the final call to action.
projected_roadmap.why_now: We are currently building the 'Strength in Numbers' Diagnostic page. This sequence ensures that the momentum from the webinar isn't lost for those who aren't ready to buy on day one.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 8 hours: Copywriting for 5 emails, automation workflow setup in CRM.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Final sign-off on the 'Stuck to Freedom' messaging pillars used in the copy.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Finalize Messaging Framework (AssetX / Stuck to Freedom).
projected_roadmap.impact: Increases the long-term conversion rate of webinar leads into diagnostic consultations.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: After the webinar ends, we don't want to just go silent on those leads. I'm proposing we build out a 5-step automated follow-up that leans heavily into your 'Strength in Numbers' concept. It keeps the conversation going while you're busy running the business, essentially doing the 'selling' for you in the background.

projected_roadmap.title: Real Estate Investor 'Lead Magnet' PDF
projected_roadmap.what: Creation of a high-value lead magnet (e.g., 'The 5 KPIs Every Real Estate Investor Needs to Scale') to drive top-of-funnel leads who aren't yet ready for a full webinar or diagnostic.
projected_roadmap.why_now: The messaging framework is shifting toward Real Estate investors (from our March 26th summary). We need an entry-level asset to build the email list outside of the live event cycle.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 10 hours: Content outline, professional PDF design, and landing page integration.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: 30-minute interview with Dan or Phil to extract the '5 KPIs' expertise.
projected_roadmap.impact: Establishes authority in the Real Estate niche and builds a database of pre-qualified leads for future email campaigns.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: We’re doing great work on the webinar, but I want to think about the people who aren't ready to commit to a 60-minute session yet. If we package your expertise into a quick '5 KPIs' guide for Real Estate investors, we can start capturing their contact info much earlier in the process. It's a huge asset for the 'Peak Interest' email campaign we discussed.

talking_points.Set up Workshop Zoom Registration & Pick: Great news—Kaden got the Zoom registration all set for April 9th, so the technical foundation for the workshop is ready to go.
talking_points.Install Google Analytics code on website: We also got Google Analytics live on the site, which is huge because we can now see exactly how people are interacting with the new landing pages.
talking_points.Request cPanel admin access from Hook Cr: Marcus, I want to flag the cPanel access request with Hook Creative. It's been on the list for a few weeks—should we send a fresh nudge to Josh to get those credentials so we don't get blocked on the site migration?
talking_points.Finalize Messaging Framework (AssetX / S: Regarding the messaging framework—do you feel we're at a 100% sign-off on the 'Stuck to Freedom' language? We're ready to bake that into all the new headers and social assets once you give the word.
talking_points.Create Workshop Headlines and Banner Cop: Dan's finishing up the headlines and banner copy for the workshop right now—we should have those for your review by tomorrow to keep us on track for the April 9th push.
talking_points.Webinar Retargeting Ad Campaign: Now that we have the webinar date locked in, I’d love to flip the switch on some simple retargeting ads to make sure we're capturing every possible registration.
talking_points.Post-Webinar 'Scorecard' Nurture Automat: I'm thinking ahead to the day after the webinar—I'd like to build an automated follow-up sequence that keeps the 'Strength in Numbers' conversation going with anyone who doesn't book a call immediately.
